creator: g.lister@nodeunit.ch
text:
Hi guys,

I have a problem upgrading to version 10.2 from version 10.1. Some of the servers seem inaccessible (update1, update4) while other work update2.freebsd.org.

My problem started with issue about a particular package:

done. Applying patches... done. Fetching 4720 files... gunzip: unknown
compression format
143f5cd95cd065b2adb90da82ee4b22489babe56a27ec97cbbecd7b55e72ed94 has
incorrect hash.

This is no longer the case as I am having this issue:

...
Applying patches... done
Fetching 4716 files... failed.

I am guessing that now I am not even able to download the problematic package. I am in Europe/Switzerland if that helps the people who maintain the servers.

TIA
George
